task: Find and open the earliest press release.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Instructure’s Press Releases page, filtered to the earliest available year (2020), moved to page 2 where the oldest 2020 entries were shown, and opened the oldest listed press release. The final page title and content confirm the opened press release was “Instructure Included on 2020 Shatter List for Helping Break Glass Ceiling in Technology” dated March 05, 2020. This satisfies the task to find and open the earliest press release.
final_result_response:
Opened the earliest listed press release:

**“Instructure Included on 2020 Shatter List for Helping Break Glass Ceiling in Technology”**  
Date: **March 05, 2020**
action_history: Opening Instructure website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.instructure.com/');
Accepting cookies and opening About menu: await page.locator('e144').click();
Opening About Us menu: await page.locator('e24').click();
Opening second page of 2020 press releases: await page.locator('e160').click();
Opening earliest press release: await page.locator('e178').click();
